name: playcanvas-editor-ts-template
author: PlayCanvas <support@playcanvas.com>
description: A simple TypeScript template for PlayCanvas that can also sync with your playcanvas.com project

scripts.build:esm: tsc --project tsconfig.esm.json && npm run rename-to-mjs && npm run copy-libs && npm run copy-esm-script
scripts.copy-libs: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('build/esm', {recursive: true}); fs.copyFileSync('lib/libktx.mjs', 'build/libktx.mjs'); fs.copyFileSync('lib/libktx.wasm', 'build/libktx.wasm'); fs.copyFileSync('lib/libktx.mjs', 'build/esm/libktx.mjs'); fs.copyFileSync('lib/libktx.wasm', 'build/esm/libktx.wasm'); console.log('✅ Copied libktx files to build/')"
scripts.copy-esm-script: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.copyFileSync('src/scripts/Ktx2LoaderScriptStandalone.mjs', 'build/esm/Ktx2LoaderScript.mjs'); console.log('✅ Copied ESM script')"
scripts.build-push:esm: npm run build:esm && npm run push
scripts.build-push:amd: npm run build:amd && npm run push
scripts.watch-push:esm: npm run build:esm && tsc-watch -p tsconfig.esm.json --onSuccess "npm run push"
scripts.watch-push:amd: npm run build:amd && tsc-watch -p tsconfig.debug.json --onSuccess "npm run push"
